## Summary

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or release automation

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant type checks, tests, and lint/format checks.
- [ ] I tested the affected user or operator flow locally when practical.
- [ ] I added or updated regression tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I checked the security impact, including secrets, permissions, and logs.

## Database changes

- [ ] No database schema change.
- [ ] Schema changes are reflected in the TypeScript schema and the migration was generated with `bun run db:generate`.
- [ ] I did not hand-edit or manually create migration files.

## Operations and release impact

- [ ] No deployment, environment, Docker, or migration-order changes.
- [ ] Documentation and operator-facing configuration are updated.
- [ ] Rollback or failure behavior is understood and documented.
